title: Chaos Community
body:
# Chaos Community


Welcome! This is a pack for a private server between friends but wanted to make a pack since the mod selection is available for anyone.

In this pack, we have Origins, Create, and other clientside mods for a more vanilla+ experience.

This can be a fun pack for both single-player and multiplayer if you wish!

He have Farmer's Delight for a fun experience for people who love to bake and cook different foods, Create for industrial automation that still feels vanilla, and some other UI enhancing and Qol features.

---

Due to this modpack still being worked on expect bugs and updates to be frequent.

Create Fabric has made it so some mods cannot be updated if you wish to do so do it at your own risk.

---

Links and credit to all non-Modrinth and some Modrinth mods used

- Fresh Animations - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations
